# terrible_community_general_twilio (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_sid` (String) User's Twilio account token found on the account page.
- `auth_token` (String) User's Twilio authentication token.
- `from_number` (String) The Twilio number to send the text message from, format `+15551112222`.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `msg` (String) The body of the text message.
- `to_numbers` (String) One or more phone numbers to send the text message to, format `+15551112222`.

### Optional

- `media_url` (String) A URL with a picture, video or sound clip to send with an MMS (multimedia message) instead of a plain SMS.
